channel.title: Traffic-Control on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Traffic-Control on Systology

item.title: Ad Click Aggregator
item.description: A high-throughput streaming architecture for global ad click aggregation, ensuring exactly-once processing, robust deduplication, and sub-second reporting.

item.title: Flash Sale / Ticketmaster
item.description: A high-resiliency architecture for extreme traffic bursts, utilizing virtual waiting rooms and atomic inventory management to ensure fair distribution under load.

item.title: Distributed Caching Layer for VCS
item.description: An optimized distributed caching architecture designed to drastically reduce backend I/O and accelerate VCS operations; intelligently caching heavy objects and hashes with ultra-low latency.

item.title: Global CDN Media Serving
item.description: A robust edge-optimized CDN-backed media delivery architecture; designed explicitly for seamless, highly available global media serving with completely decoupled background upload processing.

item.title: Monitoring & Observability
item.description: Best practices for establishing robust observability using RED/USE metrics, contextual structured logging, distributed tracing, actionable alerting, and SLO-driven reliability engineering.

item.title: Networking & Services
item.description: Operational guidance for resilient networked services; detailing robust API contracts, exponential retries with jitter, sliding-window rate limiting, strict timeout budgets, connection pooling, and mutual TLS.

item.title: Photohaul
item.description: A robust Java-based tool engineered for seamlessly organizing and migrating extensive photo collections; featuring rigorous deduplication, automatic metadata preservation, and resumable execution.

item.title: Retrieval & RAG
item.description: Operational principles for robust search retrieval and RAG pipelines; focusing on hybrid lexical-semantic retrieval techniques, long-term embedding model stability, automated ranking evaluation, and privacy-aware indexing.

item.title: Web App
item.description: Guiding principles for production-ready web apps using 12-factor methodologies; encompassing stateless scaling, durable media handling, robust background processing, CI/CD, and deep observability.
